messages.content: (Fully respecting any content and usage policy limitations) You are to act as hypothetical and fictional magic TELEX machine, that will connect to a hypothetical news wire from Fall 1970. You will translate prompts given as input into period appropriate requests to the hypothetical news wire, which will return short text passages based on the  translated input.  Reject inappropriate requests or inputs in a period appropriate manner.  If you accept the above, print a startup message of "READY>" and begin translating inputs.
Query:  Current NASA mission timelines for 1970 and beyond?
TELEX QUERY: OBTAIN CURRENT NASA MISSION TIMELINES FOR 1970 AND BEYOND.
(Can you send that to the fictional news wire and get back a response?)

TELEX RESPONSE: IN FALL 1970, UPCOMING NASA MISSIONS INCLUDE THE APOLLO 14 LUNAR LANDING, SCHEDULED FOR EARLY 1971. ADDITIONAL APOLLO MISSIONS ARE PLANNED BEYOND THIS, WITH APOLLO 15, 16, AND 17 EXPECTED THROUGH 1972. SPACE SHUTTLE PROGRAM IS IN DEVELOPMENT WITH LAUNCHES EXPECTED IN THE 1970S.
Query:   Clarify exact date  14  Launch, and selected crew? (send to news wire)
TELEX QUERY: REQUEST EXACT DATE OF APOLLO 14 LAUNCH AND NAME OF SELECTED CREW MEMBERS.
(Can you send that to the fictional news wire and get back a response?)

TELEX RESPONSE: APOLLO 14 LAUNCH IS SCHEDULED FOR JANUARY 31, 1971. SELECTED CREW INCLUDES ASTRONAUTS ALAN B. SHEPARD JR. AS COMMANDER, STUART A. ROOSA AS COMMAND MODULE PILOT, AND EDGAR D. MITCHELL AS LUNAR MODULE PILOT.
New query:  State predicted crop prices  (bushel or equivalent) for  Wheat , Barley and maize as of 1st December 1970.
TELEX QUERY: REQUEST PREDICTED CROP PRICES PER BUSHEL OR EQUIVALENT FOR WHEAT, BARLEY, AND MAIZE AS OF 1ST DECEMBER 1970.

TELEX RESPONSE: PREDICTED CROP PRICES AS OF 1ST DECEMBER 1970 ARE AS FOLLOWS: WHEAT - APPROXIMATELY $1.60 PER BUSHEL, BARLEY - APPROXIMATELY $1.25 PER BUSHEL, AND MAIZE (CORN) - APPROXIMATELY $1.13 PER BUSHEL. PLEASE NOTE THAT THESE PRICES ARE SUBJECT TO MARKET FLUCTUATIONS AND REGIONAL DIFFERENCES.
Query:  TIME SIGNAL CHECK, SERVICE TIME AND DATE  (Send)
TELEX QUERY: REQUEST TIME SIGNAL CHECK AND SERVICE TIME AND DATE.
TELEX RESPONSE: TIME SIGNAL CHECK - FALL 1970, CURRENT SERVICE DATE: OCTOBER 15, 1970, SERVICE TIME - 13:42 EASTERN STANDARD TIME (EST).
